creator: jsm@FreeBSD.org
text:
I wish to take over the maintainership of LXQt on FreeBSD, the work of Olivier Duchateau and partly myself wiki.freebsd.org/LXQt

I already have a WIP git repo https://github.com/jsm222/lxqt-freebsd

The current ports in the official tree are the dependencies of qterminal:
and currently unmaintained. LXQt depends on lxqt-config which depends on the libkscreen part of plasma5 so it would take some time to get into the official tree. see this thread on the mailling list [1]
devel/liblxqt
devel/liblxqt-l10n
devel/lxqt-build-tools
devel/libqtxdg 
x11/lxqt-i10n


[1] https://mail.kde.org/pipermail/kde-freebsd/2017-January/024851.html
